svg_glyph:
<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="Leveon v12.9 Refractive Glyph">
  <title>Leveon v12.9 Refractive Glyph</title>
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="g" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="55%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00ffcc" stop-opacity="0.55"/>
      <stop offset="55%" stop-color="#00f0ff" stop-opacity="0.24"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#d24dff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="42.70" fill="url(#g)" stroke="#ffd76a" stroke-opacity="0.42" stroke-width="1.43"/>
  <polygon points="50,6.62 60,33.20 93.38,50 60,66.80 50,93.38 40,66.80 6.62,50 40,33.20"
    fill="none" stroke="#00f0ff" stroke-width="1.43" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <polygon points="50,33.20 66.80,50 50,66.80 33.20,50"
    fill="none" stroke="#d24dff" stroke-opacity="0.75" stroke-width="1.14"/>
  <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="9.20" fill="#00ffcc" fill-opacity="0.35"/>
</svg>
answer: Structure holds when constraints align across layers. Each layer limits the next just enough to keep motion coherent.
final_english: Structure holds when constraints align across layers. Each layer limits the next just enough to keep motion coherent.
legacy_answer: The system reflects itself and stabilizes through return.
